narrative:
Greene County has 118,112 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 27.6% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -3.2% D−R vs -26.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
